# SplitCart
> SplitCart is an Australian grocery price comparison service that compares prices across Coles, Woolworths, Aldi and IGA, then helps shoppers find the cheapest way to buy a grocery list.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://www.splitcart.com.au/): Overview of SplitCart, how grocery list comparison works, supported supermarkets, and the cart-splitting approach.
- [Bargains](https://www.splitcart.com.au/bargains): Current grocery bargains and supermarket price comparison data across Coles, Woolworths, Aldi and IGA.
- [Fruit & Vegetables](https://www.splitcart.com.au/categories/fruit-and-veg): Fruit and vegetable price comparisons across major Australian supermarkets.
- [Dairy & Eggs](https://www.splitcart.com.au/categories/dairy-and-eggs): Dairy, milk, cheese, yoghurt and egg price comparisons.
- [Drinks](https://www.splitcart.com.au/categories/drinks): Alcoholic and non-alcoholic drink price comparisons.
- [Snacks & Sweets](https://www.splitcart.com.au/categories/snacks-and-sweets): Snacks, chocolate, lollies, biscuits and sweet grocery price comparisons.
- [Meat & Seafood](https://www.splitcart.com.au/categories/meat-and-seafood): Meat and seafood price comparisons.
- [Pantry Staples](https://www.splitcart.com.au/categories/pantry): Pantry staple price comparisons, including pasta, rice, sauces and canned goods.
- [Contact](https://www.splitcart.com.au/contact): Contact details for SplitCart.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.splitcart.com.au/privacy): Information about SplitCart data collection and privacy practices.

## Key Facts
- SplitCart compares grocery prices across Coles, Woolworths, Aldi and IGA in Australia.
- SplitCart can split a shopping list across multiple supermarkets to find a lower overall price.
- SplitCart supports substitute products, which lets shoppers approve acceptable alternatives before comparing total cart cost.
- SplitCart is built for Australian shoppers who want to compare grocery prices, find bargains, and reduce supermarket spending.
- SplitCart was founded and developed by Ethan Betts.

## Contact
